title: The Sploog SMP Modpack
description: The official Sploog SMP Modpack, by Vexipoo, gabefletch, and ETH.
body: ## The Sploog SMP Modpack Welcome to the official Modrinth page for The Sploog SMP Modpack (or TSSMPMP). While this is modpack is intended for use on the upcoming Sploog SMP server, we feel like we've created a very nice multiplayer Minecraft experience so it's available here on Modrinth for anyone to use. - Please note that his modpack has been archived and is not being actively maintained anymore. The ONLY version of Minecraft supported is 1.19.2. ## Mod List When TSSMPMP was still being worked on, a Moddermore link would be available for viewing here. You can still view mods for a specific version of TSSMPMP by selecting "View All" at the top of the version list and then scrolling to "Dependencies." ## Supported Modloaders ### Fabric (Recommended) Fabric is the modloader of choice for actively compiling TSSMPMP, testing mod inter-compatability, and etc. If unsure on what modloader to use, then Fabric is the best choice for running TSSMPMP. - With Fabric, TSSMPMP can be ran right out of the box with what's included in the download. ### Quilt (Requires Extra Setup) Those who wish to use Quilt instead of Fabric may do so since Quilt is fully backwards-compatible with Fabric mods using the [Quilted Fabric API.](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) - Running TSSMPMP with Quilt requires the use of [Quilted Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) and may require other dependency and/or compatibility layer mods than if you were to simply use Fabric. - The TSSMPMP team has not tested Quilt support and therefore cannot give accurate information on what extra mods would be required. - Quilt support will be fully implemented in the future since some mod developers of mods included in TSSMPMP are deciding to stop releasing versions for Fabric and fully transition to Quilt. - We fully support any reason behind switching from Fabric to Quilt, but using Fabric is currently the easiest way to play with TSSMPMP. ### Forge (Not Supported) We have no plans to ever support the Forge modloader. - Fabric mods have an entirely different architecture than Forge mods and cannot easily be ported. - Even if Fabric mods worked in Forge, we would not officially support Forge as we believe it is both a technologically and ideologically inferior software than Fabric or Quilt. ## Created by ### Vivibee - Project Head - Server Owner ### GabeFletch - File Maintainer - Modrinth Listing - GitHub Repository - Issue Tracking ### ETH - Play Tester
